caption: Original moat checklist: brand, DFS database, marketing, vertical integration, wallet, regulatory platform, and data science.
Original 4Cs product roadmap: control, content, connectivity, and customer experience.
Early state-level unit economics bridge showing expected 58% gross margin at maturity.
Initial long-term EBITDA build of $1.7B from OSB, iGaming, DFS, Canada and cost scale.
Profitability playbook linking customer payback, state contribution profit, and enterprise EBITDA.
State launch/profitability timeline showing expected 2-3 year contribution-profit maturation.
Updated long-term EBITDA model raised to $2.1B before GNOG and new initiatives.
Trough-to-inflection proof: 2018-2021 states grew revenue over 70% with contribution profit growing faster.
2023 Investor Day takeaways: faster state TAM, improving paybacks, $1.4B 2026 EBITDA, and legalization upside.
Competitive differentiation framework across product/technology, innovation velocity, scale, and brand.
State-vintage contribution profit inflection showing old vintages strongly positive and newer vintages approaching break-even.
OSB hold bridge attributing margin expansion to leg count, trading, and outcomes.
Existing-state outlook targeting $1.4B 2026 and $2.1B 2028 adjusted EBITDA.
Sportsbook hold, net revenue margin, and parlay mix continuing to rise into 2025.
Early cannibalization check showing Predictions wallet share near 0-1% through January 2026 in sportsbook states.
Expanded 2030 TAM framework of $55B-$80B with Sports including Sportsbook and Sports Predictions.
Predictions vertical-integration stack from broker through FCM, exchange, clearinghouse, and market maker.
2026 Predictions roadmap from CME launch and Crypto.com integration to market making, DCM, Super App, FCM and DCO.
Long-term adjusted gross margin comparison: Predictions at 60%-80% versus Sportsbook at 50%+.
Homegrown casino content proof points: $30B+ studio handle and $550M in-house studio GGR in 2025.
Pricing and trading technology metrics: in-house content, simulations, live availability, bet success, and payout speed.
Customer analytics and AI personalization: promotional-wager margin uplift and $400M automated/personalized promo spend.
Marketing efficiency chart showing cumulative acquisitions above 14M and CAC down over 40% from 2020 to 2025.
Sportsbook and casino handle, net revenue margin, and parlay mix trend from 2020 to 2025.
Long-term adjusted EBITDA margin target of 30%+ built from cost of revenue, sales and marketing, and expense scale.
Capital allocation framework: growth investment, capital return, and strategic M&A under low net leverage.
Q1 2026 roadmap update with completed Prediction launch, Super App embed, Crypto.com integration and market making.
Incrementality check: almost all sports volume in competitive sportsbook states remains on sportsbook and 69% of Predictions volume is from non-sportsbook states.
